name: IP_Endpoint
title: IP_Endpoint
description: Initializes a variable of type IP_Endpoint with a concrete IP endpoint (form 1) or without an IP endpoint (form 2).

parameters.name: endpoint
parameters.description: An IPv4 or IPv6 address and port number separated by a colon.

parameters.name: var name
parameters.description: Character string defining the object's variable name.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
